name: Proof Theory — Normalization
description: Natural deduction: intro/elim rules. β-reduction (elim intro), η-reduction (intro elim). Normal proof: no detour. Strong normalization: all reduction sequences terminate.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Normal proof\nno detour"]
    D2["Def: β-reduction\nelim of intro"]
    D3["Def: η-reduction\nintro of elim"]
    T1["Thm: Weak norm\nsome path to nf"]
    T2["Thm: Strong norm\nall paths terminate"]
    T3["Thm: Uniqueness\nnf unique"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D2 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    T2 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3 definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
